summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of SDPS Election iteration 2 (dual-role users, category CRUD, school logo, reset endpoints, Excel templates). Backend: 20/20 pytest tests pass covering posts, users (student+teacher), public settings, votes happy/duplicate, posts CRUD (incl. delete-with-votes blocked), Excel upload+template for both roles, settings persistence, reset votes & reset all (verifies posts retained). Frontend: kiosk student E2E (SDPSS006 → confirm Ananya Iyer / Suresh Iyer / X-A → 5 sequential votes → /thank-you → Next Student returns to /), role toggle prefills SDPSE prefix, teacher confirm shows 'Teacher' badge with Pooja Saxena/English/Coordinator (verified via screenshot). Admin: login + all 8 tabs present (Overview/Results/Voters/Candidates/Categories/Students/Teachers/Settings); Categories add+delete works (toast 'Deleted'); Students tab shows Sample Excel + Upload Excel buttons and SDPSS006 status updated to 'Voted' confirming end-to-end vote persistence; Settings tab shows Reset Votes / Reset Everything / school logo URL input.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - migrate to lifespan context manager (carry-over from iteration 1)
POST /api/admin/users/upload trusts entire xlsx content into memory with no size cap - could be hardened with file size guard before openpyxl.load_workbook
DELETE /api/admin/users/{admission_no} does not also remove the user's vote (vote.admission_no may become orphaned). Low-impact for kiosk flow but inconsistent state possible.
POST /api/admin/posts auto-generates key via slugify; no explicit max-length / collision-with-non-ascii guard, but suffix loop covers duplicates correctly.
AdminLogin route in /admin/login lacks data-testid on Sign-in button - minor (testers had to use role-based locator).

Admin reset/all wipes users + candidates but not posts; if admin runs reset/all they must re-seed users/candidates manually via Excel upload. Behaviour matches spec but worth surfacing in UI confirmation copy.
All endpoints correctly use /api prefix, exclude MongoDB _id, async motor, Pydantic validation, JWT auth - good.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on flows tested (kiosk student+teacher, admin all 8 tabs, categories CRUD)

test_credentials: Admin: Aarav / Krish@2026 (verified). Students SDPSS001..SDPSS008, Teachers SDPSE01..SDPSE03 (verified).
seed_data_creation: Tests temporarily created TEST_S100/TEST_S101/TEST_T100/TEST_UI Category/TEST_Vice Captain - all cleaned up. Backend was restarted after pytest (which calls /admin/reset/all) to re-seed users + candidates. Final state: votes reset to 0, school_logo cleared, all default seed data intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses module-scoped reset_votes fixture so it's idempotent across runs. IMPORTANT: test_reset_all_keeps_posts wipes users+candidates from DB - if you run pytest again, restart backend (sudo supervisorctl restart backend) afterwards to re-seed via on_event startup. data-testid coverage: auth-admission-input, role-student-btn, role-teacher-btn, auth-submit-btn, confirm-card, confirm-student-name, confirm-father-name, confirm-identity-btn, confirm-no-btn, vote-candidate-card-{id}, vote-next-btn, vote-prev-btn, add-category-btn, new-category-title, save-category-btn, edit-category-{id}, del-category-{id}, logo-url-input. AdminLogin Sign-in button has no testid - use get_by_role('button', name='Sign in'). ThankYou confetti uses CSS .confetti-piece spans, not <canvas>.
rca of the issue: No bugs found - all features in iteration 2 work as specified. Frontend kiosk student vote persisted to backend (SDPSS006 row shows 'Voted' in Students tab, confirming /api/votes integration). Category delete is properly blocked when votes exist (backend test verified).
